description: A short-term planning engineer creates a detailed schedule for the upcoming week, specifying which blocks will be mined each day to meet the plant's feed grade target.

nodes.task_description: Import the latest grade control model, which has the most up-to-date block grades.

expected_outcome.value: The current grade control model is loaded into the scheduling software.

nodes.task_description: Define the production targets for the week, including total tons and average copper grade to be delivered to the crusher.

expected_outcome.value: The weekly production goals are set.

nodes.task_description: Generate a schedule that sequences the mining of specific blocks to blend high- and low-grade ore, meeting the weekly targets.

expected_outcome.value: A detailed block-by-block schedule for the week is created and published for operations.
